name: Plan-Authoring Fidelity (v1.0.26)
goal: Ship v1.0.26 — restore the v1.1 design's plan-parity wording to MP-W10's semantically-identical requirement, add live-source grounding and a review-history prohibition to the plan-authoring skills, and land it on both clients.

tasks.name: Amend the v1.1 design to MP-W10 semantic-parity wording
tasks.description: Restate design lines 106, 107, 108, 303, 417 from byte-parity/canonical-renderer language to MP-W10 semantic-parity, retaining the live-source grounding clause on line 108. No tests required: design prose; correctness checked by Task 6 review and the grep verifications in steps 6-7.

steps.description: Restate line 106 (canonical-PlanJson/duplicated-mirror) to semantic-parity per plan.md Task 1 Step 1
Restate line 107 (deterministic-rendering/byte-parity) to lockstep + parity audit per plan.md Task 1 Step 2
Restate line 108 (strict-schema/byte-parity) to parity audit + live-source grounding, RETAINING the grounding clause, per plan.md Task 1 Step 3
Restate line 303 (Testing Strategy canonical-object bullet) to semantic-parity per plan.md Task 1 Step 4
Restate line 417 (acceptance criterion 19 byte-parity) to semantic-parity per plan.md Task 1 Step 5

steps.command: grep -n 'byte parity' docs/plans/2026-07-19-multi-provider-v1-1-design.md || echo "OK: no byte-parity language remains"
grep -n 'deterministic rendering' docs/plans/2026-07-19-multi-provider-v1-1-design.md || echo "OK: no renderer language remains"

steps.description: Stage changes (docs/ is gitignored per .gitignore:24 and this design doc is untracked, so -f is required or git add errors non-zero)

tasks.name: Add live-source grounding + review-history prohibition to writing-plans
tasks.description: Insert a Step 1.6 live-source grounding subsection after Phase 1 Step 1 (SKILL.md:119) and a 'No review history in plan artifacts' Key Principle. No tests required in this task; pinned by Task 4. Verified by grep in steps 3-4.

steps.description: Add Step 1.6 grounding subsection after the requirements_file paragraph per plan.md Task 2 Step 1
Add 'No review history in plan artifacts' bullet to Key Principles per plan.md Task 2 Step 2

steps.command: grep -c 'Ground every plan fact in live source' worker/skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md
grep -c 'No review history in plan artifacts' worker/skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md

tasks.name: Mirror the review-history prohibition into executing-plans regeneration
tasks.description: Append a no-history sentence to the step-8 plan-only-defect paragraph at executing-plans SKILL.md:277-280. No tests required in this task; pinned by Task 4. Verified by grep in steps 2-3.

steps.description: Append the no-prior-review-content sentence to the step-8 plan-only-defect bullet per plan.md Task 3 Step 1

steps.command: grep -c 'carries no prior-review content forward' worker/skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md

steps.description: Confirm the existing create_plan instruction is intact

tasks.name: Add skill-contract tests pinning grounding, prohibition, and regeneration mirror
tasks.description: Append phrase-assertion tests to both skill-contract suites using the existing _skill_text()/_read() helpers. Tests are GREEN on first run because Tasks 2-3 added the asserted content; they serve as regression pins. Task 6 confirms each assertion maps to a real added line so they are not vacuous.

steps.description: Add three tests to test_writing_plans_skill.py per plan.md Task 4 Step 1: test_writing_plans_requires_live_source_grounding, test_writing_plans_forbids_review_history_in_plan_artifacts, and test_writing_plans_does_not_instruct_recording_review_rounds (the design Testing Strategy item-3 negative assertion, pinning that the 'regression obligations retained' and 'reviewer-driven correction' antipattern headers never appear — both absent from the prohibition bullet so the asserts are non-tautological)
Add test_executing_plans_regeneration_carries_no_review_history to test_executing_plans_skill.py per plan.md Task 4 Step 2 (4th new test overall)
Run the two suites GREEN (tests are regression pins, not RED-first, because the skill edits already landed in Tasks 2-3)

tasks.name: Version bump (four files) + CHANGELOG
tasks.description: Bump to 1.0.26 in the four files test_version_consistency.py requires to agree, generating a fresh cachebuster at execution time, and add a CHANGELOG entry. No tests required: metadata; test_version_consistency.py is the gate.

steps.description: Confirm whether the Makefile is a fifth version site
steps.command: grep -nE 'ironclaude/ironclaude/[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' Makefile || echo "OK: Makefile has no hardcoded version"
steps.expected: OK: Makefile has no hardcoded version

steps.description: Generate a fresh cachebuster at execution time
steps.expected: a 14-digit UTC timestamp strictly greater than 20260721191336

steps.description: Bump worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json line 3 to "version": "1.0.26+codex.<CACHEBUSTER>" using the generated value
Update CHANGELOG.md: rename [Unreleased] to '## 1.0.26: plan-authoring fidelity' with the Fixed entry, add fresh ## [Unreleased] above, preserve 1.0.25 and below exactly
steps.expected: CHANGELOG head shows fresh empty [Unreleased], then the 1.0.26 section, then the unchanged 1.0.25 section

steps.command: git add commander/pyproject.toml worker/.claude-plugin/plugin.json .claude-plugin/marketplace.json worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json CHANGELOG.md

tasks.name: Full regression gates, final staging, dual-client ship runbook
tasks.description: Run every existing suite to confirm no regressions, confirm dist needs no rebuild, stage plan and design docs with -f, and present the operator-gated dual-client ship runbook with a both-caches verification gate. No tests required: runs existing suites and stages; authors no new behavior.

steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_writing_plans_skill.py tests/test_executing_plans_skill.py tests/test_version_consistency.py tests/test_workflow_transition_preflight.py -v

steps.expected: exactly 2007 passed (2003 baseline + 4 new tests from Task 4), 0 failed

steps.command: git diff --staged --name-only | grep 'state-manager/dist' || echo "OK: dist untouched — no rebuild"

steps.expected: only intended files staged; nothing unstaged in worker/skills, commander/tests, version files, or the amended design

steps.description: Stage plan and design docs (docs/ gitignored — requires -f)
Present the dual-client ship runbook to the operator per plan.md Task 6 Step 8, including the both-caches grep verification gate. Execution ends here; commit, push, and install are operator-gated.
